finding_results.notes: Added institutional resistance before each major outcome: county counsel timestamp attack, judge-level release pause with requested corroboration, clerk certification rejection, and DOJ intake defects before dual-track sign-off. Each blocker now has an on-page counteraction (dashcam retrieval + hashing, nurse notation + chain submission, certification resubmission, sworn affidavits + source-attested ingest log).
finding_results.summary: Causal struggle is now explicit: outcomes are earned through sequential obstacles and visible procedural responses rather than landing as uninterrupted phone-call declarations.

finding_results.notes: Replaced secondhand-only release with direct on-page video contact from Deshawn showing embodied aftermath (voice whistling with breath breaks, visible cuff bruising, booking wristband, exhausted presentation). Added concrete detention consequences observed in-scene: ongoing daily check-ins/no-travel legal restriction and returned empty inhaler after custody delay.
finding_results.summary: Deshawn's release now lands as an embodied consequence beat with medical and legal fallout, preserving pressure while advancing into affidavit drafting.

summary: Chapter 17 now emphasizes institutional drag and fought-for reversals while preserving continuity, voice register, and the chapter's bridge into Chapter 18 affidavit work.
